examples.name: listener_name_intro_only
examples.intro_text: Bun gasit, Adrian. Ascultati briefingul OpenWave.
examples.outro_text: Acestea au fost principalele stiri ale momentului.
examples.notes: Name is used once in the intro and never appears in stories.

examples.name: listener_name_intro_and_outro
examples.intro_text: Buna ziua, Adrian. Iata principalele stiri ale momentului.
examples.notes: Name is used once in the intro and once in the outro, reaching the hard cap.

examples.name: listener_name_disabled
examples.intro_text: Acesta este jurnalul OpenWave cu cele mai importante informatii.
examples.outro_text: Atat pentru acest buletin. Revenim in curand.
examples.notes: When no listener name is configured, the bulletin stays fully neutral.
